en.title: From DeFi to LoFi | Dial in to AI interfaces for the infinite record store

blocks.value: From DeFi to LoFi | Dial in to AI interfaces for the infinite record store
Will what comes next look much like what we’ve long grown to expect?
At the rate of change brought on by AI creative tools and interconnected seismic economic shifts, it seems very unlikely. We’re dialed in for an exponential climb.
And, despite how rough 2022 has been for the old big tech platforms and centralized finance, it’s still very clear we’re in the early part of this curve.
Where we store records of our messages and content, whether we self-custody, even how we communicate day to day — it’s all on the cusp.
Collapse, jump ship, or change.
If the CeFi masquerading as DeFi farce has taught users much, it’s that creation is infinitely better than AUM + speculation.
Social is the new social, user owned this time.

Everyone is leaving twitter, Mastodon isn’t interesting enough, and we’re all looking for something better than just another Instagram clone. A way to be more real about the process behind what we create. We number in the billions now.
TheDial.xyz is a new decentralised social media platform launching within the DIGITALAX ecosystem. A public, private, and personal social canvas where you can
save inspiration and notes from your timeline / graph
use AI to publish more interesting text, images, and textiles
collect and evolve creative drafts to earn GPU credits and grow your audience funnel
You can think of it as a streamlined mix between the best features of Figma, Evernote, and Tumblr.
An ever-evolving canvas you can use with friends.
It’s not just for web3 fashion. Although of course, that’s a major focus.

Creativity starts somewhere unique for everyone. We’re working closely with the Lens team to build an AI enhanced social interface that keeps better public memory and streamlines the inspiration-to-realization process, for the most all-inclusive creative fields first.
If you aren’t already on lens, you can join the waitlist at thedial.xyz
Dev work is starting now and the next update will drop in about 2 weeks. In the meantime, look forward to the imminent release of DIGIFIZZY Vol. 2 this month.

Twitter

Docs
